panel.title: Prayer Times
settings.location.desc: Used to fetch daily prayer times from the Aladhan API.
settings.city.label: City
settings.city.desc: Enter your city name in English.
settings.country.label: Country
settings.country.desc: Enter your country name or 2-letter code (e.g. UK, US, DZ).
settings.method.label: Calculation Method
settings.method.desc: Determines how prayer times are calculated. Choose the authority followed in your region.
settings.fajrAngle.label: Fajr Angle
settings.fajrAngle.desc: The angle of the sun below the horizon at which Fajr prayer time begins.
settings.ishaAngle.label: Isha Angle
settings.ishaAngle.desc: The angle of the sun below the horizon at which Isha prayer time begins.
settings.showCountdown.label: Show countdown
settings.showCountdown.desc: Show a live countdown to the next prayer in the bar instead of the static time.
settings.notifications.desc: Show a notification when each prayer time begins.
settings.showNotifications.label: Prayer notifications
settings.azan.desc: Play azan audio when a prayer time begins.
settings.playAzan.label: Play Azan
settings.playAzan.desc: Play the azan when each prayer time begins.
settings.azanFile.label: Azan
settings.calibration.desc: Adjust the displayed Hijri date if it does not match your local moon sighting.
settings.hijriDayOffset.label: Hijri Day Adjustment
settings.hijriDayOffset.desc: Shift the displayed Hijri day if the API date does not match your local moon sighting.
settings.school.label: Asr Calculation School
settings.school.desc: Shafi/Maliki/Hanbali uses shadow factor 1. Hanafi uses shadow factor 2, giving a later Asr time.
settings.weekStartDay.label: First day of week
settings.weekStartDay.desc: Choose which day starts the calendar week.
settings.methodCustom.label: Custom Method ID
settings.methodCustom.desc: Enter the numeric method ID from the Aladhan API (e.g. 19 for Algeria / MESRS).
settings.tune.desc: Minute adjustments applied per prayer (negative = earlier, positive = later).
settings.showElapsed.label: Show elapsed time after prayer
settings.showElapsed.desc: After a prayer begins, count up (+) for up to 1 hour. Capped at the time remaining to the next prayer. Replaces the countdown during that window.
settings.hidePrayerName.label: Hide prayer name in bar
settings.hidePrayerName.desc: Show only the time or countdown in the bar widget, without the prayer name label.
settings.widgetIcon.label: Default bar icon
settings.widgetIcon.desc: Default icon to be used by the widget
settings.dynamicIcon.label: Dynamic prayer icon
settings.dynamicIcon.desc: Use next/previous prayer in the bar widget
settings.textColor.label: Bar text color
settings.textColor.desc: Color used for text in the bar widget
settings.iconColor.label: Bar icon color
settings.iconColor.desc: Color used for the icon in the bar widget
settings.activeColor.label: Active Color
settings.activeColor.desc: Color used when prayer is Now or Elapsed
error.network: Network request failed. Check your internet connection.
